name: Steak and Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs boneless sirloin steak, 1 inch thick
1/2 cup cider or red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Place steak in a large resealable plastic bag or shallow glass container.
2. Combine vinegar, oil and soy sauce; pour over the steak.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour or overnight.
4. Drain, discarding marinade.
5. Grill or broil steak for 8-10 minutes on each side or until meat reaches desired doneness (for rare, 140°F; medium, 160°F; well-done, 170°F).
6. Slice into thin strips across the grain and place in a bowl.
7. Add potatoes, green pepper, onions, parsley and dressing; toss to coat.
8. Serve on lettuce if desired.
